question: Who is the CEO of NovaTech Inc.?
answer_paragraph: Our company, NovaTech Inc., was founded in 2005 by CEO, John Lee. As of 2022, we have over 500 employees across three locations: New York, Chicago, and San Francisco. Our mission is to provide innovative solutions to the tech industry. We strive to maintain a positive and productive work environment, and our employee benefits and policies are designed to support this goal.

question: Who presents the annual awards to deserving employees?
answer_paragraph: We believe in recognizing and rewarding our employees for their hard work and contributions. Our employee recognition and rewards programs are designed to motivate and inspire employees to excel in their roles. Our CEO, John Lee, presents the annual awards to deserving employees at our company-wide meeting in December.

question: Who is the Director of the HR department?
answer_paragraph: Our employee conduct and behavior policies are in place to ensure a safe and respectful work environment. All employees are expected to adhere to these policies, and any violations will be addressed promptly. Our HR department, led by Director, Emily Chen, is responsible for implementing and enforcing these policies.

question: When will the new diversity and inclusion training program be implemented?
answer_paragraph: As of January 1, 2023, our company will be implementing a new policy requiring all employees to complete a mandatory training program on diversity and inclusion. This program will be led by our HR department and will be completed within the first 6 months of employment. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment, and this program is an important step towards achieving this goal.
